pom.xml.general_idea: Downgrade Spring Boot parent from 4.0.2 to 3.2.3 to align with Java 21 support and stable ecosystem versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.0.2 may not be fully stable or compatible with the specific dependencies (like MyBatis Plus 3.5.5) or might require Java 21 features not yet fully utilized, but more critically, 3.2.x is the current stable LTS line for Java 17/21 migration paths in many contexts, ensuring dependency resolution works.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on JDK 21; without this change, the compiler and runtime targets remain at JDK 17, failing to utilize or comply with JDK 21 requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to explicitly set source/target to java.version and add Lombok annotation processor path with version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target configuration matching the new Java 21 property, the compiler might default to an older version or fail to compile Java 21-specific features. Explicitly adding the Lombok version in the processor path ensures the correct annotation processor is used, preventing compilation errors related to missing or mismatched Lombok versions.
